---
bibliography: references.bib
---

# Differential Expression Analysis Between Groups

## pseudobulk

### Construct pseudobulk

```{r}

library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scuttle)
library(Seurat)

setwd("/home/mouse_ad/002SC")
dir.create("004Seurat_out/004DEGs")
dir.create("004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq")
dir.create("004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L1")
dir.create("004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L2")
dir.create("004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L3")

sobj <- readRDS("004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/sobj.rds")

sobj.count <- CreateSeuratObject(sobj@assays$RNA@counts, 
                                 meta.data=sobj@meta.data)

sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(sobj.count) 

for (LEVEL in c("anno.L1", "anno.L2", "anno.L3")) {
  if (F) {
    LEVEL <- "anno.L3"
  }
  summed <- scuttle::aggregateAcrossCells(sce,
             id=colData(sce)[,c(LEVEL, "orig.ident")])

  assays(summed)$counts <- round(assays(summed)$counts)
  saveRDS(summed, paste0("004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", LEVEL, "/summed.", LEVEL, ".rds"))
}

```

### DESeq2 Differential Expression Analysis

```{r}

library(DESeq2)

for (CT in unique(summed.L1$anno.L1)) {
  summed.sub <- subset(summed.L1, ,anno.L1==CT)
  summed.sub$treatment <- factor(summed.sub$treatment, 
                                 levels=c( "WT_ctrl", "AD_5622", "AD_ctrl"))
  
  dds <- DESeqDataSet(summed.sub, ~ treatment + batch)
  
  dds <- DESeq(dds)
  
  saveRDS(dds, paste0("004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L1/", CT, ".dds.rds"))
}

for (CT in unique(summed.L2$anno.L2)) {
  summed.sub <- subset(summed.L2, ,anno.L2 == CT)
  summed.sub$treatment <- factor(summed.sub$treatment, 
                                 levels=c( "WT_ctrl", "AD_5622", "AD_ctrl"))
  
  dds <- DESeqDataSet(summed.sub, ~ treatment + batch)
  
  dds <- DESeq(dds)
  
  saveRDS(dds, paste0("004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L2/", CT, ".dds.rds"))
}

```

### Organize DESeq2 Results

1. sn DEGs table
2. rescued sn DEGs table. 

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(ggrepel)
library(EnhancedVolcano)

filt.res <- function(res) {
  res <- na.omit(res)
  res <- res[order(res$padj),]
  res <- subset(res, padj < 0.05 & baseMean > 10)
  return(data.frame(res))
}

sobj.meta <- read.csv("../002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/sobj.meta.csv", row.names=1)


# Generate merged table

for (LEVEL in c("anno.L1", "anno.L2")) {
  # LEVEL <- "anno.L2"
  CT.vec <- unique(sobj.meta[[LEVEL]])
  df.list <- list()
  n <- 1
  for (CT in CT.vec) {

    dds.path <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", 
                       LEVEL, "/",
                       CT, ".dds.rds")
    dds <- readRDS(dds.path)
    for (CP in c("AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl", "AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl")) {
      S1 <- strsplit(CP, "_vs_")[[1]][1]
      S2 <- strsplit(CP, "_vs_")[[1]][2]
      df <- results(dds, contrast = c("treatment", S1, S2))
      # Unfiltered DEGs table, useful for volcano plots
      df <- na.omit(df)
      df <- df[order(df$padj),]
      df$gene <- row.names(df)
      df$direction <- ifelse(df$log2FoldChange > 0, yes = "up", no = "down")
      write.csv(df, paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", 
                            LEVEL, "/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", LEVEL, ".", CT, ".", CP, ".raw.csv"))
      df <- subset(df, padj < 0.05 & baseMean > 10)
      if (nrow(df) > 0) {
        df$comparison <- CP
        df$cell_type <- CT
        df.list[[n]] <- df
        n <- n + 1
      }
    }
  }
  
  df.merged <- Reduce(rbind, df.list)
  
  write.csv(df.merged, paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", 
                              LEVEL, "/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", LEVEL, ".csv"))
  # anno.L1/sn.DEGs.DESeq.anno.L1.csv
  # anno.L2/sn.DEGs.DESeq.anno.L2.csv
}

# rescued genes
library(reshape2)
library(dplyr)

for (LEVEL in c("anno.L1", "anno.L2")) {
  in.path <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", 
                              LEVEL, "/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", LEVEL, ".csv")
  df.merged <- read.csv(in.path, row.names=1)
  df.merged.wide <- dcast(gene+cell_type~comparison, value.var = "direction", data=df.merged)
  df.rescued <- na.omit(df.merged.wide)
  df.rescued <- subset(df.rescued, AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl != AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl)
  out.path <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", 
                              LEVEL, "/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", LEVEL, ".rescued.csv")
  write.csv(df.rescued, out.path)
  # anno.L1/sn.DEGs.DESeq.anno.L1.rescued.csv
  # anno.L2/sn.DEGs.DESeq.anno.L2.rescued.csv
}

# GABA_0.rescued.gl <- subset(df.rescued, cell_type== "GABA_0")$gene
# GABA_0.rescued.df <- subset(df.merged, gene %in% GABA_0.rescued.gl)
# GABA_0.rescued.df <- GABA_0.rescued.df %>% arrange(gene, comparison)
```

### Volcano plot: GABA and GABA_0

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(ggrepel)
library(EnhancedVolcano)

for (LEVEL in c("anno.L1", "anno.L2")) {
  if (LEVEL == "anno.L1") {
    CT <- "GABA"
  } else {
    CT <- "GABA_0"
  }
  for (CP in c("AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl", "AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl")) {
    in.path <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", LEVEL, 
                      "/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", LEVEL, 
                      ".", CT, ".", CP, ".raw.csv")
    
    DEGs.df <- read.csv(in.path, row.names=1)
    
    DEGs.df.sub <- subset(DEGs.df, baseMean > 10)
    
    p <- EnhancedVolcano(DEGs.df.sub,
                  lab = DEGs.df.sub$gene,
                  x = 'log2FoldChange',
                  y = 'padj', 
                  xlab = "Log2 (Fold Change)", 
                  ylab="-Log10 (Adjusted p-value)", 
                  title = paste0(CT, " DEGs (", CP, ")"),
                  pCutoff = 0.05,
                  FCcutoff = 0.5,
                  pointSize = 3.0,
                  labSize = 5, 
                  subtitle = "", 
                  drawConnectors = T,
                  axisLabSize = , 
                  arrowheads = F, 
                  titleLabSize = 20, 
                  legendPosition = "top", 
                  legendLabSize = 16)
    
    out.path <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", LEVEL, 
                      "/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", LEVEL, 
                      ".", CT, ".", CP, ".vocano.png")
    ggsave(out.path, p, width=10, height=10)
  }
}
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L1/sn.DEGs.DESeq.anno.L1.GABA.AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl.vocano.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L1/sn.DEGs.DESeq.anno.L1.GABA.AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl.vocano.png")

knitr::include_graphics("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L2/sn.DEGs.DESeq.anno.L2.GABA_0.AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl.vocano.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L2/sn.DEGs.DESeq.anno.L2.GABA_0.AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl.vocano.png")
```

### GSEA Analysis

#### Exploration 1: Run code

```{r}
if (!require("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install(c("clusterProfiler", "fgsea", "msigdbr", "org.Hs.eg.db", "ggplot2"))
library(clusterProfiler)
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr) # 
library(ggplot2)

# Sort by log2FoldChange (descending)
LEVEL <- "anno.L1"
CT <- "GABA"
CP <- "AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl"
in.path <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", LEVEL, 
                  "/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", LEVEL, 
                  ".", CT, ".", CP, ".raw.csv")

res_df <- read.csv(in.path, row.names=1)

gene_list <- res_df$log2FoldChange
names(gene_list) <- res_df$gene
gene_list <- sort(gene_list, decreasing = TRUE) 
head(gene_list) 

# Get “Hallmark” gene sets (species adjustable)
# H: Hallmark,  C5: GO, C7: immune
msigdbr_species <- "Mus musculus" # or "Mus musculus"
m_df <- msigdbr(species = msigdbr_species, collection = "H") 

# Convert to GSEA input format
gene_sets <- split(m_df$gene_symbol, m_df$gs_name) 
length(gene_sets) # View significant enrichment results

# 执行GSEA
gsea_res1 <- GSEA(
  geneList = gene_list,     
  exponent = 10,             
  minGSSize = 5,           
  maxGSSize = 500,          
  pvalueCutoff = 0.05,      #
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",     
  TERM2GENE = data.frame(term = m_df$gs_name, gene = m_df$gene_symbol) # 
)

head(gsea_res@result, 10)

```


#### Exploration 2: Database choice is important

```{r}

# Adjust parameters
# minGSSize: 5, pvalueCutoff: 0.1
msigdbr_species <- "Mus musculus" 
m_df <- msigdbr(species = msigdbr_species, collection = "H") 
gene_sets <- split(m_df$gene_symbol, m_df$gs_name) 
# GSEA
gsea_res2 <- GSEA(
  geneList = gene_list,     
  exponent = 1,            
  minGSSize = 5,           
  maxGSSize = 500,          
  pvalueCutoff = 0.1,      
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",    
  TERM2GENE = data.frame(term = m_df$gs_name, gene = m_df$gene_symbol) 
)


# Change dataset
# Get mouse C5 GO biological process gene sets
mouse_go_bp <- msigdbr(species = "Mus musculus", collection = "C5", subcategory = "GO:BP")
gene_sets <- split(mouse_go_bp$gene_symbol, mouse_go_bp$gs_name)

gsea_res3 <- GSEA(
  geneList = gene_list,     
  exponent = 1,            
  minGSSize = 5,           
  maxGSSize = 500,         
  pvalueCutoff = 0.1,      
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",    
  TERM2GENE = data.frame(term = mouse_go_bp$gs_name, 
                         gene = mouse_go_bp$gene_symbol) 
)

out.dir <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", LEVEL, "/GSEA")
dir.create(out.dir)
out.path <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", LEVEL, 
                  "/GSEA/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", LEVEL, 
                  ".", CT, ".", CP, ".GO_BP.csv")
write.csv(gsea_res3, out.path)
```

#### Actual Analysis

```{r}
library(clusterProfiler)
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)
library(ggplot2)

dir.create("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L1/GSEA")
dir.create("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L2/GSEA")

sobj.meta <- read.csv("../002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/sobj.meta.csv", row.names=1)

comps <- c("AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl", "AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl")
interested.celltypes <- c("Glu_5", "GABA_1", "GABA", "GABA_0", "Glu", "Oligo", "Glu_0", "Glu_3", "Micro", "Astro", "Endo-Others", "OPC") 

for (CT in interested.celltypes) {
  if (CT %in% unique(sobj.meta$anno.L1)) {
    LEVEL <- "anno.L1"
  } else {
    LEVEL <- "anno.L2"
  }
  for (CP in comps) {
    if (F) {
      # EDA
      CT <- "GABA"
      LEVEL <- "anno.L1"
      CP <- "AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl"
    }
    in.path <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", LEVEL, 
                      "/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", LEVEL, 
                      ".", CT, ".", CP, ".raw.csv")
    
    res_df <- read.csv(in.path, row.names=1)
    
    res_df$RANK <- rank(-res_df$baseMean)
    
    res_df <- subset(res_df, RANK <= 12000)
    
    gene_list <- res_df$log2FoldChange
    names(gene_list) <- res_df$gene
    gene_list <- sort(gene_list, decreasing = TRUE) 
    
    for (COLLECT in c("H", "C2", "C5")) {
      if (F) {
        # EDA
        COLLECT <- "C2" 
      }
      m_df <- msigdbr(species = "Mus musculus", collection = COLLECT)
      
      gsea_res4 <- GSEA(
        geneList = gene_list,     
        exponent = 1,             
        minGSSize = 5,           
        maxGSSize = 500,          
        pvalueCutoff = 0.1,      
        pAdjustMethod = "BH",     
        TERM2GENE = data.frame(term = m_df$gs_name, 
                               gene = m_df$gene_symbol)
      )
      out.path <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", LEVEL, 
                        "/GSEA/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", LEVEL, 
                        ".", CT, ".", CP, ".", COLLECT, ".rds")
      saveRDS(gsea_res4, out.path)
    }
  }
}


```


#### GSEA Result Visualization

##### merge LEVEL1 GSEA results

Generate an overview result similar to Metascape heatmaps:

- Enrichment patterns across comparisons
- Prefer representative pathways

```{r}

meta.sn <- read.csv("../002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/sobj.meta.csv", row.names=1)


COLLECT <- "C5"

for (LEVEL in c("anno.L1", "anno.L2")) {
  # LEVEL <- "anno.L2"
  CT.vec <- unique(meta.sn[[LEVEL]])
  
  if (LEVEL=="anno.L2") {
    CT.vec <- c("Glu_3", "Glu_5", "GABA_0", "GABA_1")
  }
  
  df.list <- list()
  n <- 1
  for (CP in c("AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl", "AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl")) {
    for (CT in CT.vec) {
      if (F) {
        CT <- "GABA"
      }
      out.path <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", LEVEL, 
                      "/GSEA/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", LEVEL, 
                      ".", CT, ".", CP, ".", COLLECT, ".rds")
      gsea_result <- readRDS(out.path)
      df <- gsea_result@result # [ c("ID", "NES", "qvalue", "core_enrichment")]
      
      if (nrow(df) > 0) {
        df.cols <- colnames(df)
        df$cell_type <- CT
        df$comparison <- CP
        df <- df[, c("cell_type", "comparison", df.cols)]
        df.list[[n]] <- df
        n <- n + 1
      }
      # p <- gseaplot2(gsea_result, 1:5, pvalue_table = T, pvalue_table_columns = "pvalue")
      # ggsave("")
    }
  }
  
  df.merged <- Reduce(rbind, df.list)
  
  df.merged <- df.merged[order(df.merged$cell_type, 
                     df.merged$comparison, 
                     df.merged$qvalue), ]
  
  out.path <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", LEVEL, 
                     "/GSEA/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", LEVEL, ".merged.", COLLECT, ".csv")
  write.csv(df.merged, out.path)
}

# out.path <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", LEVEL, 
#                 "/GSEA/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", "anno.L2", 
#                 ".", "GABA_1", ".", "AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl", ".", COLLECT, ".rds")
# gsea_result <- readRDS(out.path)

```

##### Explore merged data

```{r}

head(sort(table(df.merged$ID), decreasing = T), 10)

# GOBP_AEROBIC_RESPIRATION 2
# GOBP_AUTONOMIC_NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DEVELOPMENT 2
# GOBP_ATP_SYNTHESIS_COUPLED_ELECTRON_TRANSPORT 2

subset(df.merged, ID == "GOBP_AEROBIC_RESPIRATION")
subset(df.merged, ID == "GOBP_ATP_SYNTHESIS_COUPLED_ELECTRON_TRANSPORT") # 情况和GOBP_AEROBIC_RESPIRATION类似。

subset(df.merged, ID == "GOBP_AUTONOMIC_NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DEVELOPMENT") # 在GABA rescued。
#                                            cell_type         comparison                                        ID                               Description setSize
# GOBP_AUTONOMIC_NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DEVELOPMENT       GABA AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl GOBP_AUTONOMIC_NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DEVELOPMENT GOBP_AUTONOMIC_NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DEVELOPMENT      17
# GOBP_AUTONOMIC_NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DEVELOPMENT1      GABA AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl GOBP_AUTONOMIC_NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DEVELOPMENT GOBP_AUTONOMIC_NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DEVELOPMENT      17
#                                            enrichmentScore       NES       pvalue   p.adjust     qvalue rank                  leading_edge
# GOBP_AUTONOMIC_NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DEVELOPMENT         0.799437  2.226844 7.280948e-05 0.02112999 0.02051677  463 tags=29%, list=4%, signal=28%
# GOBP_AUTONOMIC_NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DEVELOPMENT1       -0.810331 -2.360443 2.940640e-06 0.01818786 0.01774289  623 tags=35%, list=5%, signal=34%
#                                                                 core_enrichment
# GOBP_AUTONOMIC_NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DEVELOPMENT          Tfap2b/Gata3/Sema3f/Ret/Nrp1
# GOBP_AUTONOMIC_NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DEVELOPMENT1 Ret/Phactr4/Nrp2/Sema3f/Gata3/Tfap2b

```

##### rescued pathways

```{r}
library(reshape2)

LEVEL <- "anno.L1"
COLLECT <- "C5"
out.path <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", LEVEL, 
                   "/GSEA/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", LEVEL, ".merged.", COLLECT, ".csv")

sn.gsea <- read.csv(out.path, row.names=1)
  
df.wide <- dcast(ID+cell_type~comparison, value.var = "NES", data=sn.gsea)

df.wide.sub <- na.omit(df.wide)

# Up-rescued pathways?
df.wide.sub.up_rescued <- subset(df.wide.sub, FADCtrl_vs_WTCtrl < 0 & PLX5622_vs_FADCtrl > 0)
```


##### 绘制氧化磷酸化gseaplot

```{r}

library(enrichplot)

gsea_result <- readRDS("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L2/GSEA/sn.DEGs.DESeq.anno.L2.GABA_1.AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl.C5.rds")
View(gsea_result@result)

# Plot oxidative phosphorylation
interested.celltypes <- c("Glu_5", "GABA_1", "GABA", "GABA_0", "Glu", "Oligo", "Glu_0", "Glu_3")

CT <- "GABA"
LEVEL <- "anno.L1"
CP <- "AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl"
COLLECT <- "C5"
out.path <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", LEVEL, 
                  "/GSEA/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", LEVEL, 
                  ".", CT, ".", CP, ".", COLLECT, ".rds")

gsea_result.GABA <- readRDS(out.path)

View(gsea_result@result)
View(subset(gsea_result@result, qvalue < 0.05 & NES > 0)) # GOBP_OXIDATIVE_PHOSPHORYLATION

# oxidative phosphorylation
gseaplot2(gsea_result.GABA, "GOBP_OXIDATIVE_PHOSPHORYLATION",
          title="GOBP_OXIDATIVE_PHOSPHORYLATION", 
          pvalue_table = T, pvalue_table_rownames = NULL)

CT <- "Glu"

out.path <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", LEVEL, 
                  "/GSEA/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", LEVEL, 
                  ".", CT, ".", CP, ".", COLLECT, ".rds")

gsea_result.Glu <- readRDS(out.path)
gseaplot2(gsea_result.Glu, "GOBP_OXIDATIVE_PHOSPHORYLATION",
          title="GOBP_OXIDATIVE_PHOSPHORYLATION", 
          pvalue_table = T, pvalue_table_rownames = NULL)

View(subset(gsea_result@result, qvalue < 0.05 & NES > 0)) 

```

##### Plot GABA differentiation gseaplot

After using gseaplot2 to generate GSEA plots, I want to adjust plot details, but it does not return a standard ggplot object. How can I modify it? Are there alternative functions?

Using gseaplot, which returns a ggplot object, I want to modify segment thickness. Can I directly use ggplot layering, or must I modify the source code?

```{r}
# Differentiation-related
library(enrichplot)

LEVEL <- "anno.L1"
COLLECT <- "C5"
pathway <- "GOBP_AUTONOMIC_NERVOUS_SYSTEM_DEVELOPMENT"

for (CP  in c("AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl", "AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl")) {
  out.path <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", LEVEL, 
                  "/GSEA/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", LEVEL, 
                  ".", "GABA", ".", CP, ".", COLLECT, ".rds")

  gsea_result <- readRDS(out.path)
  
  p1 <- gseaplot(gsea_result, geneSetID = pathway, by = "runningScore")
  p1@layers$geom_linerange <- NULL
  p1@layers$geom_line <- NULL
  pvalue <- round(subset(gsea_result@result, ID==pathway)$p.adjust, 3)
  
  p1 <- p1 + ggtitle("GO: Autonomic Nervous System\nDevelopment", 
                     subtitle = paste0("Adjusted p-value = ", pvalue)) + 
    geom_linerange(aes(x = x, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax), 
                   linewidth = 0.1,  
                   color = "black") +  
    geom_line(aes(y=runningScore), color="green", size=0.5) + 
    theme_nature() + theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(size=8))
    # theme(axis.title = element_text(size=9, face = "bold"), 
    #         plot.title = element_text(size=10, face = "bold"),  
    #         plot.subtitle = element_text(size=8))
  # p1 <- gseaplot2(gsea_result, pathway, title=pathway, 
  #           pvalue_table = T, pvalue_table_rownames = NULL)
  
  # publish: 
  ggsave(paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/GABA_development.", CP, ".gseaplot.png"), p1, width=2.4811, height=2.4174, dpi=300)
  ggsave(paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/GABA_development.", CP, ".gseaplot.pdf"), p1, width=2.4811, height=2.4174, device=cairo_pdf)
}




if (F) {
  # EDA: 
  ggsave("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/GABA_development.PL_vs_AD.gseaplot.png", p1, width=6.15, height=4.28, dpi=300)
  ggsave("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/GABA_development.AD_vs_WT.gseaplot.png", p2, width=6.15, height=4.28, dpi=300)
}

```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/GABA_development.AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl.gseaplot.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/GABA_development.AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl.gseaplot.png")

```

##### draw Glu gseaplot


```{r}
library(enrichplot)

LEVEL <- "anno.L1"
COLLECT <- "C5"
pathway <- "GOBP_CALCIUM_ION_TRANSMEMBRANE_TRANSPORT"

for (CP  in c("AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl", "AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl")) {
  out.path <- paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/", LEVEL, 
                  "/GSEA/sn.DEGs.DESeq.", LEVEL, 
                  ".", "Glu", ".", CP, ".", COLLECT, ".rds")

  gsea_result <- readRDS(out.path)
  
  p1 <- gseaplot(gsea_result, geneSetID = pathway, by = "runningScore")
  p1@layers$geom_linerange <- NULL
  p1@layers$geom_line <- NULL
  pvalue <- round(subset(gsea_result@result, ID==pathway)$p.adjust, 3)
  
  p1 <- p1 + ggtitle("GO: Calcium Ion Transmembrane\nTransport", 
                     subtitle = paste0("Adjusted p-value = ", pvalue)) + 
    geom_linerange(aes(x = x, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax), 
                   linewidth = 0.1,  
                   color = "black") +  
    geom_line(aes(y=runningScore), color="green", size=0.5) + 
    theme_nature() + theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(size=8))
    # theme(axis.title = element_text(size=9, face = "bold"), 
    #         plot.title = element_text(size=10, face = "bold"),  
    #         plot.subtitle = element_text(size=8))
  # p1 <- gseaplot2(gsea_result, pathway, title=pathway, 
  #           pvalue_table = T, pvalue_table_rownames = NULL)
  
  # publish: 
  ggsave(paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/Glu_Calcium.", CP, ".gseaplot.png"), p1, width=2.6, height=2.4174, dpi=300)
  ggsave(paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/Glu_Calcium.", CP, ".gseaplot.pdf"), p1, width=2.6, height=2.4174, device=cairo_pdf)
}

```

### Visualization of single-gene differences between groups

After obtaining differential expression results with DESeq2, how can specific genes be visualized?

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
dds <- readRDS(paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L2/",
                      "GABA_0", ".dds.rds"))

if (F) {
  # Default DESeq2 plots are not visually appealing
  plotCounts(dds, gene="Plk2", intgroup="treatment")
  plotCounts(dds, gene="Tfap2b", intgroup="treatment")
  plotCounts(dds, gene="Mical2", intgroup="treatment")
}

# Extract plotting data
dir.create("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L2/gene_expr")

p.list <- list()
for (TG in c("Tfap2b", "Plk2", "Mical2")) {
  data <- plotCounts(dds, gene=TG, 
                     intgroup=c("treatment", "batch"), 
                     returnData = T)
  
  data$treatment <- factor(data$treatment, levels=c("WT_ctrl", "AD_ctrl", "AD_5622"), ordered=T)
  
  # Draw boxplot
  expr.max <- max(data$count)
  expr.max.log <- log10(expr.max)
  expr.max.exp <- 10^(expr.max.log*1.3)
  
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x=treatment, y=count, fill=treatment)) +
    geom_boxplot() +
    geom_line(aes(group=batch)) + 
    geom_point(aes(color=batch), size=2) +
    geom_signif(annotations = c("*", "*"), 
                y_position=c(expr.max.log*1.1, expr.max.log*1.2), 
                xmin=c(1, 2), xmax=c(2, 3))+ 
    labs(x="", y="Normalized Count") + 
    coord_cartesian(ylim=c(NA, expr.max.exp)) + 
    scale_y_log10() + 
    ggtitle(TG) +
    theme_nature()
  
  if (TG != "Mical2") {
    p <- p + theme(legend.position = "none")
  }
  p.list[[TG]] <- p
}

pall <- wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=3)

ggsave("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L2/gene_expr/Tfap2b_Plk2_Mical2.boxplot.png", pall, width=3.5*2.5, height=3.14, dpi=300)


# extract plotting anno.L1

dds <- readRDS(paste0("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L1/GABA.dds.rds"))

dir.create("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L1/gene_expr")

p.list <- list()
for (TG in c("Grip1os2", "Rorb", "Tmem132d")) {
  data <- plotCounts(dds, gene=TG, 
                     intgroup=c("treatment", "batch"), 
                     returnData = T)
  
  data$treatment <- factor(data$treatment, levels=c("WT_ctrl", "AD_ctrl", "AD_5622"), ordered=T)
  
  # draw boxplot
  expr.max <- max(data$count)
  expr.max.log <- log10(expr.max)
  expr.max.exp <- 10^(expr.max.log*1.3)
  
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x=treatment, y=count, fill=treatment)) +
    geom_boxplot() +
    geom_line(aes(group=batch)) + 
    geom_point(aes(color=batch), size=2) +
    geom_signif(annotations = c("*", "*"), 
                y_position=c(expr.max.log*1.1, expr.max.log*1.2), 
                xmin=c(1, 2), xmax=c(2, 3))+ 
    labs(x="", y="Normalized Count") + 
    coord_cartesian(ylim=c(NA, expr.max.exp)) + 
    scale_y_log10() +  
    ggtitle(TG) +
    theme_nature()
  
  if (TG != "Tmem132d") {
    p <- p + theme(legend.position = "none")
  }
  p.list[[TG]] <- p
}

pall <- wrap_plots(p.list, ncol=3)

ggsave("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L1/gene_expr/Grip1os2_Rorb_Tmem132d.boxplot.png", pall, width=3.5*2.5, height=3.14, dpi=300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L1/gene_expr/Grip1os2_Rorb_Tmem132d.boxplot.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/DESeq/anno.L2/gene_expr/Tfap2b_Plk2_Mical2.boxplot.png")
```

## cell level DEGs

### Identify DEGs using Wilcoxon method

```{r}
sobj <- readRDS("002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/sobj.rds")

for (LEVEL in c("level1", "level2")) {
  
  if (LEVEL == "level2") next
  
  if (LEVEL == "level1") {
    cellType_col <- "anno.L1"
  } else if (LEVEL == "level2") {
    cellType_col <- "anno.L2"
  }
  
  sobj@meta.data[["treatment_ct"]] <- paste0(sobj@meta.data$treatment, "_",
                                            sobj@meta.data[[cellType_col]])
  Idents(sobj) <- "treatment_ct"
  
  cellTypes <- unique(sobj@meta.data[[cellType_col]])
  
  outdir.sub <- "002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/wilcox"
  dir.create(outdir.sub)
  
  pairs <- list(c("AD_5622", "AD_ctrl"),
                c("AD_5622", "WT_ctrl"), 
                c("AD_ctrl", "WT_ctrl"))
  
  degs.list <- list()
  
  for (pair in pairs){
    cat("pair: ", pair, "\n")
    a <- pair[1]
    b <- pair[2]
    Comparison <- paste0(a, "_vs_", b)
    for (ct in cellTypes){
      cat("ct: ", ct, "\n")
      Base <- paste0(ct, ".", Comparison, ".csv")
      aa <- paste0(a, "_", ct)
      bb <- paste0(b, "_", ct)
      res <- FindMarkers(sobj, ident.1=aa, ident.2=bb, 
                         test.use="wilcox", 
                         logfc.threshold=0, 
                         min.pct = 0.01, 
                         return.thresh = 1)
      degs.list[[paste0(ct, ".", Comparison)]] <- res
    }
  }
  
  saveRDS(degs.list, "002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/wilcox/sn.DEGs.cell.level2.wilcox.raw.rds")
  
  # Merge into sn.DEGs table
  # Filtering criteria: padj < 0.05, min.pct > 0.1?
  
  degs.list.filtered <- list()
  n <- 1
  for (pair in pairs){
    cat("pair: ", pair, "\n")
    a <- pair[1]
    b <- pair[2]
    Comparison <- paste0(a, "_vs_", b)
    for (ct in cellTypes){
      cat("ct: ", ct, "\n")
      df <- degs.list[[paste0(ct, ".", Comparison)]]
      df$comparison <- Comparison
      df$celltype <- ct
      df$gene <- row.names(df)
      df <- subset(df, p_val_adj < 0.05 & pct.1 > 0.1)
      degs.list.filtered[[n]] <- df
      n <- n + 1
    }
  }
  
  sn.DEGs <- do.call(rbind, degs.list.filtered)
  row.names(sn.DEGs) <- 1:nrow(sn.DEGs)
  
  out.path <- paste0("002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/wilcox/sn.DEGs.cell.", LEVEL, ".wilcox.filtered.csv")
  
  write.csv(sn.DEGs, out.path)
}

```

### Glu investigation

```{r}

df.L1 <- read.csv("../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/wilcox/sn.DEGs.cell.level1.wilcox.filtered.csv", row.names=1)

# rescued genes
library(reshape2)
df.L1.w <- dcast(gene+celltype~comparison, value.var = "avg_log2FC", data=df.L1)
df.L1.w <- df.L1.w[, c("gene", "celltype", "AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl", "AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl")]
df.L1.w <- na.omit(df.L1.w)
df.L1.rescued <- subset(df.L1.w, AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl*AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl < 0)
length(unique(df.L1.rescued$gene))
# [1] 1450
write.csv(df.L1.rescued, "../002SC/004Seurat_out/004DEGs/wilcox/sn.DEGs.cell.level1.wilcox.filtered.rescued.csv")

# Remove ambient RNA contamination
cell.DEGs <- read.csv("../002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/anno.L1.FindAllMarkers.csv", row.names=1)
df.ambient <- subset(cell.DEGs, (!cluster %in% c("Glu", "GABA")) & avg_log2FC > 0.4)


# Obtain responsive and rescued genes
df.L1.glu.respon <- subset(df.L1.glu, comparison == "AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl" & celltype== "Glu" & abs(avg_log2FC) > 0.1)

length(unique(df.L1.glu.respon$gene)) # 132

df.L1.glu.rescued <- subset(df.L1.rescued, celltype == "Glu" & 
                              abs(AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl) > 0.1 & 
                               !(gene %in% df.ambient$gene))

length(unique(df.L1.glu.rescued$gene))
# [1] 51

df.L1.glu.rescued2 <- subset(df.L1.rescued, celltype == "Glu" & 
                               abs(AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl) > 0.1 & 
                               abs(AD_ctrl_vs_WT_ctrl) > 0.1 & 
                               !(gene %in% df.ambient$gene))

length(unique(df.L1.glu.rescued2$gene)) # 14

# Human AD vs WT DEGs
# The meaning of High_Low: braak score high vs low。
df.human <- read.csv("C:\\Users\\a8799\\Desktop\\database\\rosmap_PFC_SN\\pseudobulk.FC427DEG.csv")

df.human.glu <- subset(df.human, celltype=="Exc" & 
                         baseMean > 10 & 
                         abs(log2FoldChange) > 0.1 & 
                         padj < 0.05)

# ID conversion
install.packages("homologene")
library(homologene)
out <- homologene(df.human.glu$gene, inTax = 9606, outTax = 10090)

mapping <- out$`10090`
names(mapping) <- out$`9606`

df.human.glu$gene.mouse <- mapping[df.human.glu$gene]
human.up <- subset(df.human.glu, log2FoldChange > 0 & !is.na(gene.mouse))
human.down <- subset(df.human.glu, log2FoldChange < 0 & !is.na(gene.mouse))
length(unique(human.up$gene.mouse))
# [1] 341
length(unique(human.down$gene.mouse))
# [1] 318

df.L1.glu.rescued.conserved.up <- subset(df.L1.rescued, celltype == "Glu" & 
                              AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl > 0.1 & 
                               (!(gene %in% df.ambient$gene)) & 
                                gene %in% human.down$gene.mouse)

df.L1.glu.rescued.conserved.down <- subset(df.L1.rescued, celltype == "Glu" & 
                              AD_5622_vs_AD_ctrl > 0.1 & 
                               (!(gene %in% df.ambient$gene)) & 
                                gene %in% human.up$gene.mouse)

```
